title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEMS THIRTY, THIRTY-THREE, THIRTY-FOUR, THIRTY-SIX, THIRTY-EIGHT, FORTY, AND FORTY-THREE, SUBSECTION IV, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5471 / 53 OG No. 21, 7601 (November 15, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1962, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEMS THIRTY, THIRTY-THREE, THIRTY-FOUR, THIRTY-SIX, THIRTY-EIGHT, FORTY, AND FORTY-THREE, SUBSECTION IV, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Items thirty, thirty-three, thirty-four, thirty-six, thirty-eight, forty, and forty-three, subsection IV, section three of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, are amended to read as follows: 1962

"30.

Camonsil Primary School Building, Po-totan Construction of additional room including repair and/or improvement of school site

P4,000.00

"33.

Badiangan Primary School Building, Pototan Repair and/or improvement of school site

1,000.00

"34.

Cahaguichican Primary School Building, Pototan Repair and/or improvement of school site

1,000.00

"36.

Igang Primary School Building, Pototan Completion and improvement of school site

3,000.00

"38.

Nasirum Primary School Building, Pototan Completion and improvement of school site

3,500.00

"40.

Tipolo Primary School Building, Pototan Repair and/or improvement of school site

1,000.00

"43.

Janipa-an Primary School Building, Pototan Repair and/or improvement of school site

1,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
